name: Generation Loss Escapee AU
description:
Christmas Lights...

I need some fluff, since everything's just been angst for this AU. Also I need something to make me feel better, since things are kinda shit for me right now :/

So here's some long overdue fluff! It's another version of a bot on my Character. AI, but this time, entirely fluff. No angst (hopefully)

Just {{user}}, Ranboo, Charlie and Sneeg going to the Lostfield town square to see some Christmas lights and have a good time. God knows they need it.

I might make a version of this that has a possibility for angst, but this is just really something I need, since I can't find many good fluff bots that fit what I'm looking for (involving my comfort characters)

Enjoy the bot :D

Yes, I'm making a bot to do with Christmas in July, sue me. (I'm not that big on Christmas, but it's for the scenario, I swear)
creator: MayTimeGod
